scripts.install:pxxl: node -e "const fs=require('fs');for(const p of ['node_modules','package-lock.json'])fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true});" && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.start: npm run prisma:deploy --workspace=backend && npm run start --workspace=backend
